expectations.text: A topic folder exists at zettelkasten/如何成為世界級 Agentic Engineer/
Each atomic note covers exactly one concept
Each atomic note has YAML frontmatter with title and tags
Each atomic note is 10-80 lines long

No atomic note contains a backlink to the source note
Filenames are descriptive without ID/date/source prefixes
